assertions.description: The gerber set has 8 files (B.Cu, B.Mask, B.Paste, B.SilkS, F.Cu, F.Mask, F.Paste, F.SilkS) plus 1 drill file. No outline/Edge.Cuts file is present — correctly flagged as complete=false with missing_required=['Edge.Cuts']. Drill classification: 215 via holes (0.381mm), 167 component holes (1.016mm, 0.9906mm), 10 mounting holes (1.5748mm, 2.9972mm) all correctly categorized.

assertions.description: F.SilkS extents (68.708mm wide) slightly exceed the PCB board width (68.58mm) but alignment is reported as aligned=true with no issues. This is correct — silkscreen legends slightly outside the board edge is normal and expected, not a misalignment.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: has_npth_drill=false and no note is raised. For a board with mounting holes (10 holes at 1.5748mm and 2.9972mm classified as PTH mounting holes), it would be worth noting the mounting holes are in the PTH file rather than a separate NPTH file. This is not necessarily wrong but could be flagged as an observation.
